infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: KWASU ICT Nav needs your location to show you on the faculty map and provide navigation.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: KWASU ICT Nav needs your location for live navigation.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: KWASU ICT Nav needs your camera for QR code scanning and AR navigation.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow KWASU ICT Nav to use your location for campus navigation.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow KWASU ICT Nav to use your location.
